items.textSample: Why it worksOfferGet template Get the template
Header End
A Carrd demo that sells the plugin systemThis page is intentionally long. It shows the full stack, explains why each plugin exists, and gives buyers a direct path from curiosity to
Why the funnel worksLead with proof, then introduce the offer, then close with a clear CTA.
Proof first
Offer second
Choose your versionKeep the full showcase for teaching and selling, or strip it down into a lightweight clone.
Full demo packThe extended version with explanation, examples, and conversion copy. Buy full demo packLightweight clone Buy lightweight clone
What the stack includesEach card below is a reusable layer inside the same system.
Full demoLite clone
Full demoLite clone
Explains every plugin and keeps the long-form sales narrative.Keeps the plugin behavior and removes the extra words.
Resellable layers
The same structure works as a demo, a template, or a separate marketing landing.
Full demoLite clone
How the same build ships three ways
Extended demo: explains every plugin and keeps the teaching copy.
Lean clone: keeps the plugin behavior and removes the extra words.
Template pack: a reusable starter for new client or product pages.
Network landing: the outer sales layer for the mini-template direction.
Production footer: the final CTA, form, and trust layer.
Choose the angleSame stack, different market message.
Full demoLite cloneTemplate network
Use the full demo when the site needs teaching, proof, and conversion in one place.
Use the lite clone when you want a cleaner page with fewer words.
Use the template network when the site itself becomes the product line.
